languages.text: "Вам разрешено питаться на моем корабле лишь погибшими членами экипажа, пленниками и друг другом".

traits.locale_text: "Вам разрешено питаться на моем корабле лишь погибшими членами экипажа, пленниками и друг другом".
"Вам разрешено питаться на моем корабле лишь погибшими членами экипажа, пленниками и друг другом".

languages.text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."
languages.original_text: "Вам разрешено питаться на моем корабле лишь погибшими членами экипажа, пленниками и друг другом".

traits.locale_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."
"On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."
"On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."

languages.text: "Auf meinem Schiff dürft ihr euch nur von den toten Besatzungsmitgliedern, meinen Gefangenen und untereinander ernähren."
languages.original_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."

languages.text: "Sur mon navire, vous ne pouvez vous nourrir que des membres morts de l'équipage, de mes prisonniers et les uns des autres."
languages.original_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."

languages.text: "在我的船上 你们只能以死去的船员为食" "我的俘虏" "还有彼此"
languages.original_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."

languages.text: "En mi barco sólo se os permite alimentaros de los miembros muertos de la tripulación, de mis prisioneros y de los demás".
languages.original_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."

languages.text: "私の船では、乗組員の死体、囚人、そして互いのみを食べることが許されている"
languages.original_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."

languages.text: "Benim gemimde sadece mürettebatın ölülerinden, tutsaklarımdan ve birbirinizden beslenmenize izin verilir."
languages.original_text: "On my ship you are only allowed to feed on the dead members of the crew, my prisoners and one another."
